transforms.code:
import random
	
	def generate_random_rgba():
	    r = random.randint(0, 255)
	    g = random.randint(0, 255)
	    b = random.randint(0, 255)
	    a = round(random.uniform(0, 1), 2)
	    return "rgba({}, {}, {}, {})".format(r, g, b, a)
	    
	randomColor = generate_random_rgba()
	css = "linear-gradient(to bottom, {} 60%, transparent 100%)".format(randomColor)
	
	return css
